mechanism: Options are cheapest precisely in the 8.5-10.5% vol-of-vol transition zone when regime uncertainty is highest. This hedging paradox means pre-positioned gamma strategies have the best entry when current conditions (low FX vol, high regime uncertainty) prevail.
regime_dependence: Holds specifically in the 8.5-10.5% realized FX vol transition zone; above threshold options are expensive, below threshold regime uncertainty is lower
